theme: What HR directors say after working with us

linkedin.text:
"I used to dread planning the annual company event. Now I just call Alon."

That's an HR Director at a leading Israeli tech company (200+ employees), after three events with us.

What she told us:
"From the first call it was different. They asked about our culture and our people — not just the budget. In Athens, my CEO pulled me aside after the awards dinner and said it was the best thing we'd ever done for our people.

Since then we've done Barcelona and Prague. Each one better than the last. Engagement scores are at an all-time high. The ROI isn't just retention — it's reputation. We're now known as the company that takes care of its people."

That reputation is the real return on an incentive trip.

📅 Book a free 30-minute planning call and we'll map your first program.
